description_long: This is a single-story residential bungalow with a modern, boxy architectural style and a flat roof. The exterior walls are predominantly white, with large rectangular windows on multiple sides allowing ample natural light into the interior. The layout features several distinct rooms, visible through the open plan and window placements, including what appears to be a living area, bedrooms, and a study or library with bookshelves. The main entrance is marked by a solid brown door, and the windows are symmetrically arranged on the front and sides. The interior is partially visible, showing some furniture and room divisions, but there is no visible porch or veranda. The structure is compact and designed for urban or suburban placement, with a clean, minimalist aesthetic.
description: A modern, single-story white bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a compact, open-plan layout. The design is minimalist, with symmetrical window arrangements and no visible porch.
description_view_0: Front view showing large windows, the main entrance, and a glimpse into the living and study areas.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brown entrance door, additional windows, and the depth of the building's layout.
description_view_2: Rear view with fewer windows and a more closed-off appearance, showing the back rooms and structural extensions.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displaying more windows and the building's angular, modern form, with visible interior divisions.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side windows
